caption: Three people are seated on a stage during a presentation. A man on the left wears a white long-sleeved shirt and gray trousers, while a woman in the center wears a black t-shirt and black trousers. A man on the right is dressed in a gray suit jacket and gray trousers. They sit in light-colored chairs with gold-toned legs. In front of the people are large, white, textured rectangular blocks. The background is dark with vertical purple lighting strips. As the sequence progresses, the man on the right speaks and gestures with his hands, while the other two individuals remain seated and listen. A dark silhouette of a person's head is visible in the foreground, partially obscuring the lower center and right of the scene. The letters "L" and "S" are partially visible in the lower right corner of the later frames.
